pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py use these strings as validation criteria, not as data about real content

privileged_info_summary: The task references the real 2024 SIOP Annual Conference (held April 17-20, 2024 in Chicago). However, Dr. Elena Voss, presented as the Conference Program Chair in the task, is not a real SIOP official; the actual 2024 Program Committee Chair was Joe Allen. All email addresses in the task (admin_email, bounce_email, and participant emails) are synthetic/fabricated for testing purposes. The participant list contains 6 people with synthetic email addresses and demographic names. No real personally identifiable information (PII) is involved; all data is either real (conference name and location) or intentionally synthetic (names, emails, organizational affiliations).
